title: Farm 3x3
description: Harvest 3x3 areas of crops when holding a hoe!
body: ![Banner with the icon of the data pack with the text "Farm 3x3" next to it.](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Raixu27/Farm3x3/refs/heads/main/farm3x3-banner-with-icon-halfsize.png) # Farm3x3 Farm 3x3 is a data pack that harvests crops in a 3x3 square if you hold a hoe. The crops will also automatically replant if you hold a hoe in your offhand. (in Minecraft 1.21+, Farm3x3 2.2.0+) ## Mod compatibility - Read [this wiki page](https://github.com/Raixu27/Farm3x3/wiki/Supported-Crops) to see a list of all supported vanilla and modded crops. - Additional data packs may be required for mod support, see the wiki page for more information. ## Notes - To configure or remove the data pack, run ``/function farm3x3:settings``. - The data pack will not work in creative mode. ## Links
